description: Create a content slide on AI data center energy demand with a three-column layout showing themes, impacted industries, and business considerations as bullet lists.

header.headline: AI data center demand intensifies competition for affordable energy—companies need to be strategic in planning their energy needs and investments

items.text: Power availability and price: Utilities; Independent power providers; Grid operators; Energy-intensive industries including data centres (EII)
Grid and connection bottlenecks: Utilities; Grids; Large industrial sites
Location and footprint: Manufacturing; Logistics; Data centers

right.title: Business consideration if AI demand significantly outpaces grid supply

items.text: Power availability and price: Increase usage of long-term PPAs and hedging strategies for EIIs, to ensure resilience supply and manage price volatility
Power availability and price: Review the potential headwinds surrounding sustainability goals with future trade-offs surfacing surrounding reliability, price and carbon intensity
Power availability and price: Embrace flexibility and efficiency to reduce constraints on the grid and avoid peak price periods
Grid and connection bottlenecks: Create agility in the planning process to navigate potential delays as connection bottlenecks lead to growth constraints for manufacturing and other industrial sites
Grid and connection bottlenecks: Anticipate ecosystem, revenue and supply shocks as the expansion plans of partners and customers are also impacted
Grid and connection bottlenecks: Plan for talent shortages and supply chain bottlenecks surrounding energy infrastructure roll out
Location and footprint: Consider energy infrastructure plans when selecting locations for site expansion for Manufacturing or other EIIs
Location and footprint: Review logistic networks and supply chains and the potential to reorientate around future industrial clusters anchored in energy availability
